title: piper pohlianum
intro: Piper pohlianum, also known as the Indian long pepper, is a type of flowering vine native to the tropical forests of India. It has been used in traditional medicine for centuries, valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Piper pohlianum include its ability to alleviate digestive issues, reduce fever, and provide relief from respiratory problems. Piper pohlianum is commonly prepared as an herbal tea or powder, and in some cases, it is also used as a spice in traditional Indian cuisine.
